name: centromere_like
description: Centromeric and pericentromeric chromatin: the spindle-attachment region of each chromosome. Architecturally a layered assembly of (i) the active alpha-satellite higher-order-repeat (HOR) array that binds CENP-A nucleosomes, (ii) flanking divergent monomeric alpha satellite, (iii) pericentric blocks of beta/gamma satellite and Human Satellite II/III, and (iv) segmental duplications. Sizes 0.1-5 Mb per chromosome, fully resolved only by T2T-CHM13 (2022). This is the broader category that contains the individual satellite tandem_repeat entries; classifier rules should rank centromere_like above the constituent satellites when multiple satellite types co-occur in a window.
